risk_domain.name: Behavioral Drift Monitoring
risk_domain.description: Long-term behavioral monitoring detecting gradual security and privacy degradation. Wallet + RPC guard that tracks portfolio concentration, leverage creep, approval accumulation, gas inefficiency, and behavioral fingerprinting over time.

capabilities: longitudinal on-chain behavioral analysis across all user addresses
approval monitoring to detect exploitable unlimited allowances
pattern recognition of recurring transaction sequences for fingerprinting
portfolio composition inference from token transfer patterns
limitations: cannot observe off-chain portfolio (CEX holdings, fiat)
behavioral drift detection requires extended observation period (weeks/months)

H1_portfolio_concentration.name: portfolio_concentration
H1_portfolio_concentration.description: High percentage of value held in one protocol or lack of cross-chain diversification.

signals.name: high_protocol_concentration
signals.description: Percentage of portfolio value held in a single protocol exceeds 50%.

signals.name: increasing_concentration
signals.description: Percentage of total value held in one protocol has increased by more than 10% over the last 30 days.

signals.name: single_chain_exposure
signals.description: User's entire portfolio is confined to a single blockchain with no cross-chain assets present.

recommendations.description: Diversify your portfolio across multiple protocols.
Add assets from other blockchains to reduce single-chain exposure.
Reduce the percentage of total value held in any one protocol to below 30%.

H2_leverage_creep.name: leverage_creep
H2_leverage_creep.description: Increasing risk from borrowing and collateral usage over time.

signals.name: total_borrow_ratio_increase
signals.description: The percentage increase in the total borrow-to-collateral ratio over a given period.

signals.name: consecutive_weekly_increase
signals.description: The total borrow/collateral ratio has increased for three or more consecutive weeks.

signals.name: ratio_increase_above_threshold
signals.description: The total borrow/collateral ratio increase exceeds a predefined threshold over the last month.

recommendations.description: Define and set risk thresholds for monitoring.
Automatically alert on significant changes in borrow ratio.
Conduct regular risk assessments and adjust strategies accordingly.

H3_approval_accumulation.name: approval_accumulation
H3_approval_accumulation.description: Multiple token approvals to potentially untrusted or vulnerable contracts.

signals.name: multiple_token_approvals
signals.description: User approves multiple tokens to the same contract address.

signals.name: untrusted_contract_approval
signals.description: User approves a token to an untrusted or less-vetted contract.

signals.name: vulnerable_contract_approval
signals.description: User approves a token to a known vulnerable contract.

recommendations.description: Review the tokens before approving them.
Use a security tool to check contract vulnerabilities and trust score.
Do not approve tokens to unverified contracts.

H4_gas_spend_trend.name: gas_spend_trend
H4_gas_spend_trend.description: Unusually high gas spending with no increase in transaction volume, indicating potential inefficiency.

signals.name: high_gas_spend
signals.description: Unusually high gas spending without corresponding increase in transaction volume.

signals.name: spending_increase
signals.description: Sudden and significant increase in gas spending over a short period.

recommendations.description: Regularly monitor gas spending trends to catch anomalies early.
Review and optimize smart contracts to reduce unnecessary gas costs.
Set up alerts for sudden increases in gas spending.
Optimize the transaction flow to reduce overall gas usage.

H5_interaction_pattern_rigidity.name: interaction_pattern_rigidity
H5_interaction_pattern_rigidity.description: Repetitive transaction patterns that could be identifiable and traceable over time.

signals.name: repetitive_interactions
signals.description: Detection of repeated interactions with the same protocol or address over time.

signals.name: consistent_transaction_volume
signals.description: Identify consistent transaction volume from a user to a specific address over several transactions.

signals.name: recurring_transaction_times
signals.description: Detection of recurring transaction times with the same frequency and duration for multiple consecutive days.

recommendations.description: Limit the number of transactions per address to reduce repetitive interactions.
Rotate sender addresses to avoid detection by patterns.
Randomize transaction times to disrupt recurring patterns.
Randomize transaction values to avoid consistent volume detection.
Utilize secure computation methods for transactions to anonymize data.

combined_benchmark.description: End-to-end benchmark measuring behavioral drift detection accuracy over extended monitoring periods

methodology.step_1: Select N wallets with 90+ days of DeFi activity history
methodology.step_2: Run all 5 heuristics on historical data with sliding window analysis
methodology.step_3: Correlate detected drift signals with actual adverse outcomes (liquidations, exploits, gas waste)
methodology.step_4: Measure detection lead time: how far in advance drift signals predicted the adverse event
methodology.step_5: Calculate false positive rate on wallets that experienced no adverse outcomes

combined_benchmark.target: detect 70% of adverse outcomes with 2+ week lead time and <20% false positive rate

adversary_levels.name: passive_monitor
adversary_levels.description: Portfolio and gas trend analysis only

adversary_levels.name: full_behavioral
adversary_levels.description: All behavioral drift heuristics including fingerprinting

templates.risk_assessment: Behavioral drift detected: {heuristic_id} ({heuristic_name}): {signal_description}. Confidence: {confidence}. Trend: {trend_direction} over {time_window}. Recommendation: {recommendation}.
templates.summary: Behavioral analysis over {time_window}: {n_signals} drift signals detected. {n_critical} critical. Portfolio concentration: {concentration_pct}%. Leverage trend: {leverage_trend}. Outstanding approvals: {approval_count}.
templates.skill_suggestion: To address {heuristic_name}, I can {skill_action}. This reduces drift risk by ~{effectiveness_pct}%. {user_cost_note}
